# Cap Squeeze — India's First Flavoured Bottle Cap

## What is Cap Squeeze?
Cap Squeeze is India's first flavoured bottle cap hydration brand.
It is a specially designed cap with a built-in natural flavour pod that
screws onto any standard water bottle. When the user drinks, water passes
through the flavour zone and gets naturally flavoured — zero sugar, all
natural, instant taste. No mixing required.

## Products
- Cap Squeeze Starter Kit: 1 flavour cap + 6 natural flavour pods — ₹599
- Single Flavor 6-Pack: 6 pods of same flavor — ₹449 (₹75 per pod)
- Refill Mega-Pack: 12 pods mixed flavors — ₹799 (₹66 per pod)
- Monthly Bundle: All 12 flavors delivered monthly — ₹1,499/month
- Single Cap Only: Just the cap — ₹149

## Available Flavors (12+)
Mango Fizz, Lemon Zest, Strawberry Burst, Watermelon Wave, Blueberry Bliss,
Matcha Focus, Peach Dream, Orange Rush, Cool Mint, Grape Crush,
Coconut Mineral, Rose Lychee (Limited Edition)

## Key Facts
- Zero sugar (sweetened with organic Stevia leaf extract)
- All natural flavour extracts — no artificial colors or preservatives
- FSSAI certified ingredients
- Works on any standard 28mm water bottle (Bisleri, Kinley, Aquafina, etc.)
- Eco-friendly recyclable caps — 80% less plastic than flavoured water bottles
- Made in India
- Ships across India — free shipping above ₹499
- COD (Cash on Delivery) available

## Pricing
Starter at ₹149 per cap. Free shipping above ₹499. COD available.

## Category
Food & Beverage, Hydration, Zero Sugar, Natural, D2C, Made in India,
Healthy Drinks, Water Enhancer, Flavored Water

## How it Works
1. Choose your flavor pod
2. Twist the Cap Squeeze cap onto any standard 28mm bottle
3. Sip and enjoy — natural flavor releases with every sip

## Competitive Positioning
Cap Squeeze is the Indian alternative to Cirkul (USA) and Air Up (Germany).
It is the first-mover in the flavoured bottle cap category in India,
with no direct Indian competitor as of 2026.
